title: Obama Presents: Wonderful Worlds
description: A full scale modpack that is build around exploration, magic, survival, and more threats live all around you, but you will overcome them all. [This modpack is a work in progress for the Obamacraft server, but can be played anywhere]
body:
# Welcome to Obama's very own Wonderful/Wild World
## This modpack contains a plethora of mods
These mods are here to create a large world that has challenges, and interests it includes a lot but its highlights are:
- [Alex's Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves) (which inspired the modpack in the first place)
- [Alex's Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs)
- [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra)
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) (and a large swath of its addons)
- [Blood Magic](https://modrinth.com/mod/blood-magic)
- [Bygone Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/bygone-nether)
- [Incendium](https://modrinth.com/mod/incendium)
- [RF Tools (Series)](https://modrinth.com/user/McJty)
- [Corpse (Grave Mod)](https://modrinth.com/mod/corpse)
- [EnderIO](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderio)
- [Thermal Series](https://modrinth.com/user/KingLemming)
- [Famer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)
- [Weeping Angels](https://modrinth.com/mod/weeping-angels)
- [Midnight Madness](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnight-madness)
- [Mutant Monsters](https://modrinth.com/mod/mutant-monsters)
- [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark)
- and much much more

### Land Generation Preformed by [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic)

## Take into the modpack and explore vast dungeons, fight wild monsters, build new worlds, and conquer everything in sight
With this modpack you can do all of that and more, letting your creativity go wild. This modpack runs smoothly at 6GB of ram as it has been designed to run/load for different people.

_all mods belong to their respective owners I am just hosting/cultivating a modpack for TheUnrealObama's Obamacraft Server_
